title: Audit Assistant (Central)
description:
📍 Location: Lavender.

🕒 Work Hours: Monday to Friday (8.30am - 5.30pm).

💰 Salary: Up to $3,500.

Our client operates as a public accounting firm in Singapore, offering a full suite of audit, tax, and advisory services, and is part of an established international network of professional firms.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Assist in the planning, execution, and completion of statutory audits across various industries.
  • Conduct audit fieldwork, testing, and prepare working papers in accordance with auditing standards.
  • Identify accounting, audit, and internal control issues and recommend practical solutions.
  • Coordinate with clients to obtain financial information and clarify audit matters.
  • Support seniors and managers in preparing audit reports and financial statements.
  • Ensure timely completion of assignments while complying with firm policies and professional standards.


Job Requirements:

  • Degree in Accountancy or ACCA qualification.
  • Minimum 1 year of relevant audit experience.
  • Strong analytical, communication, and interpersonal skills.
  • Able to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.
  • Capable of meeting tight deadlines and managing multiple priorities.


To apply, kindly click APPLY NOW to submit your latest CV.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.



SAAY

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
postedCompany.name: SEARCH AVENUE PRIVATE LIMITED
